name: belovodye-uikit
description: Belovodye UiKit monorepo with Vue 3 foundations, optional systems, Storybook docs, playground, and OSS-ready repository tooling.

scripts.dev:docs: pnpm --filter @ww/tokens build && pnpm --filter @ww/themes build && pnpm --filter @ww/primitives build && pnpm --filter @ww/core build && pnpm --filter @ww/charts-apex build && pnpm --filter @ww/signal-graph build && pnpm --filter @ww/data-grid build && pnpm --filter @ww/widgets build && pnpm --filter @ww/page-templates build && pnpm --filter @ww/docs storybook
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ww/tokens build && pnpm --filter @ww/themes build && pnpm --filter @ww/primitives build && pnpm --filter @ww/core build && pnpm --filter @ww/charts-apex build && pnpm --filter @ww/signal-graph build && pnpm --filter @ww/data-grid build && pnpm --filter @ww/widgets build && pnpm --filter @ww/page-templates build && pnpm --filter @ww/playground build && pnpm --filter @ww/docs build
scripts.check:architecture: pnpm check:boundaries && pnpm check:public-imports && pnpm check:topology
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @ww/tokens typecheck && pnpm --filter @ww/themes typecheck && pnpm --filter @ww/primitives typecheck && pnpm --filter @ww/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @ww/charts-apex typecheck && pnpm --filter @ww/signal-graph typecheck && pnpm --filter @ww/data-grid typecheck && pnpm --filter @ww/widgets typecheck && pnpm --filter @ww/page-templates typecheck && pnpm --filter @ww/playground typecheck && pnpm --filter @ww/docs typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm test:playground
scripts.verify: pnpm check:catalog && pnpm check:stories && pnpm check:docs && pnpm check:playground-coverage && pnpm check:adr && pnpm check:ai-rules && pnpm check:architecture && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm build:pages
